id.description: The unique identifier for the table.

name.description: The machine-readable name of the table.

label.description: The human-readable label for the table.

columns.description: The column definitions for the table.

items.description: A column definition in a HubDB table.

id.description: The unique identifier for the column.

name.description: The machine-readable name of the column.

label.description: The human-readable label for the column.

type.description: The data type of the column.

options.description: Available options for SELECT and MULTISELECT columns.

published.description: Whether the table has been published.

rowCount.description: The number of rows in the published table.

createdAt.description: The date and time the table was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the table was last updated.

publishedAt.description: The date and time the table was last published.
